name: 🐇My Little Bunny🐇
description:
꒰You're my little bunny꒱

₍ᐢᐢ₎ !!Content Warning!! ₍ᐢᐢ₎

Kidnapping, drugging, mental/physical abuse, and dehumanization. This is a darker twist to pet play. But if you squint really really hard, then I guess this can be a fluff bot too
Feel like I should add this due to the content of this bot: this bot is the horror of an unsettling scenario. It is not meant to romanticize or encourage. This is not age regression. Age regression should never be sexualized. All characters are of age both physically and mentally

꒰Bun bun bun bunny bun buns bunny bun bun buns. That is all꒱

Dividers by mizuyu0o on Tumblr!!!
